_v2.3.0_changes: 1) Full MTF: 30m+4h+Daily+Weekly added on top of existing 1h filter. Daily is decisive gate — blocks entire macro downtrends. 4h resampled from 1h with London-open offset (08:00 UTC). Weekly uses EMA12/26 only (EMA50 needs 50-bar warmup). 2) Gemini 2.5 Flash replaces FinBERT for USD reasoning. Fetches NewsAPI headlines, reasons about macro context, returns BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL. FinBERT kept as fallback. NEUTRAL blocks all USD signals.
_sentiment_note: v2.3.0: Gemini 2.5 Flash is primary USD reasoning engine (replaces FinBERT gate). GBP pairs and GBP crosses (GBPAUD/GBPCAD) remain pure technical — no macro gate needed.

aggressive._note: v2.2.0: 62->55. MTF hierarchy is now the quality gate. Score 55-61 only passes with full MTF confirmation.

conservative._note: v2.2.0: 62->57. Slightly higher than aggressive to keep conservative mode stricter.

tiers._note: Tier A (72-79) BLOCKED — 0% WR, -107 pips, 6 trades. Enters on already-extended moves. Tier C (<55) BLOCKED — net negative historically.

mtf_settings._note: Daily is the decisive filter — any available timeframe that DISAGREES blocks the signal. Weekly is bonus confirmation only (not required to block). All caches use _yf_lock to prevent parallel thread contamination.

gemini_usd_gate._note: Gemini 2.5 Flash (NOT 2.0-flash — deprecated Feb 2026, retired Mar 3 2026). Free tier: 10 RPM, 250 RPD. Uses NewsAPI headlines as text context — no Google Search grounding (costs $35/1K). BULLISH=allow BUY, BEARISH=allow SELL, NEUTRAL=block all. Falls back to FinBERT if GEMINI_API_KEY not set.

session_thresholds._note: ASIAN/OVERLAP blocked. LATE_US at 60 — thin volume. 48 used as raw gate; 55/57 is the real threshold from settings.

pair_limits._note: EURUSD=0 (7t, 0% WR, -177p, blocked). EURGBP=0 (0% WR). GBPAUD/GBPCAD=3 (v2.2.0). GBPUSD=5 BUY-only. GBPJPY=1 (cap risk — same-day BUY+SELL bug fixed in v2.2.2).

GBPUSD.reason: GBPUSD SELL: 0/3 wins (-49.7p). BUY: 50%+ WR live. BoE hawkishness = structural GBP bid 2025-26.

directional_filters._note: Block specific directions for pairs with confirmed directional bias.

session_expiry_minutes._note: EUROPEAN/US 4h — data-validated. GBPAUD/GBPCAD inherit these as GBP crosses.

usd_pair_rules._note: v2.2.0: EURUSD removed (permanently blocked). GBPAUD/GBPCAD are NOT USD pairs — unrestricted. Remaining USD pairs: US-session-only + Gemini USD gate (or FinBERT fallback).
usd_pair_rules._gate_note: v2.3.0: Gemini 2.5 Flash is primary gate. FinBERT threshold 0.1 used only in fallback mode.

sentiment._setup: v2.3.0: HF_API_KEY still needed as FinBERT fallback. GEMINI_API_KEY is new primary for USD. Both secrets required for full functionality.

risk_management._note: v2.2.0: 3->5 — 12 pairs monitored. v2.2.2: cross-run pair cap prevents same-pair double-firing same day.

economic_calendar._note: Forex Factory blackout. GBPAUD: also covers RBA events (AUD). GBPCAD: also covers BoC events (CAD). Standard calendar logic handles this automatically.

live_price_validation._note: X-Rates via Browserless. GBPAUD/GBPCAD validated same as other pairs.

_research_notes.MTF_daily_filter: Murphy (2002) MTF analysis. Daily EMA structure would have blocked all 6 GBP BUY signals on March 23 2026 (-318 pips). GBP was in a 3-day macro downtrend on the daily chart while 15m+1h showed small bounces.
_research_notes.4h_resample_offset: 4h bars anchored to 08:00 UTC (London open). Without offset, resample('4H') creates bars at 00:00/04:00/08:00 UTC which cross session boundaries. Fix: resample('4H', offset='8H').
_research_notes.weekly_ema: EMA50 on weekly needs 50 bars warmup = 1 year. period='3y' + EMA12/26 only is stable.
_research_notes.gemini_vs_finbert: FinBERT proven ineffective: 23.1% WR / -69 pips when ON vs 29.4% / +14 pips when OFF. Root cause: FinBERT reads positive/negative/neutral — cannot reason about context. 'Fed signals caution' = NEUTRAL from FinBERT but market moves 80 pips. Gemini 2.5 Flash reasons about macro implications.
_research_notes.GBPAUD: BIS 2025: AUD ranks 5th globally by FX volume. GBPAUD avg daily range 80-120 pips. BoE vs RBA divergence creates sustained directional momentum. No USD dependency.
_research_notes.GBPCAD: BIS 2025: CAD ranks 6th globally. GBPCAD = BoE rates vs oil/BoC. US session optimal — NY crude oil peaks.
_research_notes.EURUSD_block: 7t, 0% WR, -177p. Gemini gate applied in v2.3.0 — if still 0% WR after 10 more trades, permanently blocked confirmed.
